description: Recto: Legal document in which Abū l-Khayr Ḥananʾel (Khiyār) b. Yaʿaqov releases Benaya b. Moshe from a partnership with ʿAllān b. Nahray, after the former had handed over to him corals deposited with Abū Isḥāq Avraham b. Yefet ha-Levi and Abū l-Khayr Shelomo b. Saʿadya al-Ṣūrī (of Tyre). Dated: Thursday, 25 Av 1411 = 2 August 1110 CE. (Information from Goitein's index cards.) See also T-S J1.11 + T-S 6Ja3 (PGPID 40206).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
